articles.title: MS Dhoni IPL 2026: Calf Strain Sidelines Cricket Legend
articles.what_this_means: MS Dhoni's calf strain has sidelined the CSK captain for IPL 2026's opening two weeks. The legendary wicketkeeper will undergo rehabilitation while CSK tests its bench strength. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this impacts IPL viewing schedules and raises questions about Dhoni's availability for India's upcoming international commitments later in 2026.

articles.title: IPL 2025 Opening Night: RCB vs SRH at Chinnaswamy Stadium
articles.what_this_means: IPL 2025 kicked off at the historic M. Chinnaswamy Stadium with RCB taking on SRH in a thrilling opener that reminded us why we lose sleep for India cricket. Key performances from Virat Kohli and Abhishek Sharma, plus your complete guide to catching IPL 2025 matches from the US.

articles.title: Postcards from Hong Kong: Ridhi Dogra's New Travel Series on Hotstar 2026
articles.what_this_means: Bollywood star Ridhi Dogra fronts National Geographic's new two-episode travel series Postcards from Hong Kong, premiering March 28 on JioHotstar. The documentary explores Hong Kong beyond its iconic skyline with authentic stories and local experiences — perfect for Indian diaspora audiences seeking quality content. Stream it now on JioHotstar Premium ($5.99/month) in the US.
